request: Rank Audi R8 models from 2007 till 2025
title: RANKING AUDI R8 MODELS
close_narration: So, which R8 would you park in your garage: V8, V10, GT, or V10 Plus?
order_rationale: Ordered from the original V8 model to the high-performance V10 Plus, showcasing the evolution of the R8's power and exclusivity.

entries.name: R8 V8
entries.label: ORIGINAL ICON
entries.one_line_fact: Debuting in 2007 at $109,000, the R8 V8's 414 horsepower and manual gearbox made it an instant classic, blending supercar performance with daily drivability.

entries.name: R8 V10
entries.label: V10 POWERHOUSE
entries.one_line_fact: In 2009, the R8 V10 hit the scene at $146,000, packing 518 horsepower and a Lamborghini-derived engine, elevating the R8's performance to new heights.

entries.name: R8 GT
entries.label: LIMITED EDITION
entries.one_line_fact: Then came the 2011 R8 GT, a $196,800 limited edition with 552 horsepower, carbon fiber panels, and a track-focused design, making it a collector's dream.

entries.name: R8 V10 Plus
entries.label: ULTIMATE PERFORMANCE
entries.one_line_fact: At number one, the 2013 R8 V10 Plus, starting at $174,795, boasts 550 horsepower, ceramic brakes, and a sharper chassis, delivering the pinnacle of R8 performance.
